source_files: public/locales/<lang>/loc_main.json for lang in de, en, fr, it, es, rm (rm carries only the intro block)
_meta.loaded_by: app/routes/layouts/lang_layout.tsx (every page). The `intro` block is additionally loaded for EVERY content language at once and handed to app/components/blocks/site-intro/index.tsx, because the alternative-language offer is rendered in the OFFERED language.
_meta.description: Top-level lang-layout chrome: Settings menu, main navigation, the site-intro toast (`intro` block: cookie notice, content-language explainer, alternative-language switch offer — the intro is loaded in every content language, incl. rm which has no other UI locale), plus project/experiments SEO copy (`metas`).
_meta.format: Each entry: context (where the string appears in the UI, its role, placeholders and length/grammar constraints) + the current de/en/fr texts as translation reference. Use the context when translating into a new language; a null text means the key is missing in that language file.
_meta.generated: 2026-07-15, code-verified against app/; loc_intro merged into loc_main.

settings.menu_label.context: Trigger button of the header Settings dropdown menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); short noun.

settings.appearance.context: Quiet section label above the first grouped card in the header Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx), grouping theme, font size, contrast and grayscale rows; short noun.

settings.theme.context: Row label in the Settings menu next to the theme select (System/Light/Dark) (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); keep short.

settings.theme_system.context: Option in the theme select of the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx): follow the operating-system color scheme.

settings.theme_light.context: Option in the theme select of the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx): light color scheme.

settings.theme_dark.context: Option in the theme select of the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx): dark color scheme.

settings.font_size.context: Row label in the Settings menu next to a -/+ font-size stepper (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); keep short.

settings.font_size_decrease.context: aria-label of the minus button of the font-size stepper in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); imperative verb phrase for screen readers.

settings.font_size_increase.context: aria-label of the plus button of the font-size stepper in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); imperative verb phrase for screen readers.

settings.high_contrast.context: Row label for the on/off switch enabling a higher-contrast display mode, Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); keep short.

settings.grayscale.context: Row label for the on/off switch that desaturates the UI to grayscale, Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); keep short.

settings.language.context: Quiet section label above the language card in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx), grouping interface-language and content-language rows; short noun.

settings.interface_language.context: Row label for the UI-language select in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); means the interface/chrome language as opposed to the data (content) language; keep short.

settings.content_language.context: Row label for the content-language select in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); 'content language' = the language the parliamentary data (names, titles, texts) is displayed in, independent of the interface language.

settings.content_language_auto.context: Default option in the content-language select (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx): content language follows the interface language automatically.

settings.content_language_note.context: Explanatory note paragraph below the content-language select in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); explains the fallback chain when a data record lacks the chosen language.
settings.content_language_note.en: Language of the displayed data (names, titles, texts). Independent of the interface; when a record isn't available, the next language is used.
settings.content_language_note.de: Sprache der angezeigten Daten (Namen, Titel, Texte). Unabhängig von der Oberfläche; fehlt ein Eintrag, wird die nächste Sprache verwendet.
settings.content_language_note.fr: Langue des données affichées (noms, titres, textes). Indépendante de l'interface ; si une donnée manque, la langue suivante est utilisée.

settings.content_language_priority.context: Label prefix rendered as 'Priority: de > fr > ...' before the content-language fallback order in the Settings menu (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); short noun.

nav.home.context: aria-label of the parlhub logo link back to the home page in app/routes/layouts/project_layout.tsx and experiments_layout.tsx headers; screen-reader only, format 'parlhub — <home>'.

nav.skip_to_content.context: Skip link (WCAG 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks): the first focusable element in the body, rendered by app/components/blocks/skip-link/index.tsx from app/routes/layouts/lang_layout.tsx. Off-screen until it receives keyboard focus, then visible above the header; activating it jumps focus past the header chrome to the page's <main>. Imperative, short enough to fit one line in a 44px button.

nav.explore.context: Trigger button of the header's Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) that opens the grid of all data sections; short noun meaning the data catalogue.

nav.start.context: Label of the 'Start here' entry link at the top of the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx), leading to the guided entry page; short, inviting.

nav.start_desc.context: One-line description under the 'Start here' link in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx); 'chambers' = parliamentary chambers, 'cantons'/'communes' = Swiss administrative levels.
nav.start_desc.en: Quicklinks to chambers, cantons and communes

nav.start_desc.fr: Liens rapides vers les chambres, cantons et communes

nav.group_parliament.context: Group heading in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) over People/Parliaments/Committees & groups (groups defined in app/configs/sidebars.config.ts NAV_SECTION_GROUPS); short noun for parliamentary actors.

nav.group_proceedings.context: Group heading in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) over Affairs/Votings/Meetings; short noun for parliamentary proceedings/operations.

nav.group_records.context: Group heading in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) over Speeches/Texts/Documents; short noun for written/spoken records.

nav.groups.context: Menu item in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) linking to the Groups section (committees and parliamentary groups/fractions); de 'Gremien' and fr 'Organes' are deliberately broader than en to avoid heading collisions.

nav.affairs.context: Menu item in the header Explore dropdown (app/components/blocks/header/index.tsx) linking to the Affairs section; 'affair' (de 'Geschäft', fr 'objet') = a legislative business item (motion, bill, interpellation).

intro.cookie.context: Site-intro toast (app/components/blocks/site-intro): cookie-notice line — only essential, functional cookies; no analytics, no tracking. Shown in the interface language.
intro.cookie.en: We use only essential, functional cookies. No analytics, no tracking.
intro.cookie.de: Wir verwenden nur essenzielle, funktionale Cookies. Keine Analyse, kein Tracking.
intro.cookie.fr: Nous utilisons uniquement des cookies essentiels et fonctionnels. Aucune analyse, aucun suivi.
intro.cookie.it: Utilizziamo solo cookie essenziali e funzionali — nessuna analisi, nessun tracciamento.
intro.cookie.es: Solo utilizamos cookies esenciales y funcionales — sin análisis, sin seguimiento.
intro.cookie.rm: Nus dovrain mo cookies essenzials e funcziunals — nagina analisa, nagin fastizar.

intro.dataLang.context: Site-intro toast: content-language explainer — data is shown by a language priority that is independent of the interface and adjustable under Settings › Content language. Shown in the interface language.
intro.dataLang.en: Switzerland has four national languages, and this data comes in several of them. Some records are in multiple languages, some in only one. You can choose which language the content is shown in; when your choice isn't available for a record, the remaining languages are used in a set priority order. This is independent of the interface language. Set it under Settings › Content language (top right).
intro.dataLang.de: Die Schweiz hat vier Landessprachen, und diese Daten liegen in mehreren davon vor. Manche Einträge sind mehrsprachig, andere nur in einer Sprache. Sie können wählen, in welcher Sprache die Inhalte angezeigt werden; ist Ihre Wahl für einen Eintrag nicht verfügbar, werden die übrigen Sprachen in einer festen Prioritätsreihenfolge verwendet. Dies ist unabhängig von der Oberflächensprache. Einstellbar unter Einstellungen › Inhaltssprache (oben rechts).
intro.dataLang.fr: La Suisse a quatre langues nationales, et ces données existent dans plusieurs d'entre elles. Certaines entrées sont en plusieurs langues, d'autres dans une seule. Vous pouvez choisir la langue d'affichage du contenu ; si votre choix n'est pas disponible pour une entrée, les autres langues sont utilisées selon un ordre de priorité défini. Ceci est indépendant de la langue de l'interface. Réglable dans Paramètres › Langue du contenu (en haut à droite).
intro.dataLang.it: La Svizzera ha quattro lingue nazionali e questi dati esistono in diverse di esse — alcune voci in più lingue, altre in una sola. Puoi scegliere in quale lingua mostrare i contenuti; se la tua scelta non è disponibile per una voce, vengono usate le altre lingue secondo un ordine di priorità prestabilito. Questo è indipendente dalla lingua dell'interfaccia. Impostabile in Impostazioni › Lingua del contenuto (in alto a destra).
intro.dataLang.es: Suiza tiene cuatro lenguas nacionales, y estos datos existen en varias de ellas — algunos registros en varias lenguas, otros en una sola. Puede elegir en qué idioma se muestra el contenido; cuando su elección no está disponible para un registro, se utilizan las demás lenguas en un orden de prioridad fijo. Esto es independiente del idioma de la interfaz. Configúrelo en Ajustes › Idioma del contenido (arriba a la derecha).
intro.dataLang.rm: La Svizra ha quatter linguas naziunalas, e questas datas existan en pliras da quellas — intgins tips en pliras linguas, auters mo en ina. Ti pos tscherner en tge lingua ch'ils cuntegns vegnan mussads; sche tia tscherna n'è betg disponibla per in tip, vegnan duvradas las autras linguas tenor in urden da prioritad fix. Quai è independent da la lingua da la surfatscha. Reglabel sut Configuraziuns › Lingua dal cuntegn (sisum dretg).

intro.alt.context: Site-intro toast: alternative-language offer line, shown in the OFFERED language (names that language in-language, e.g. fr → '…en français'). Rendered when the page isn't in one of the visitor's browser languages but a supported one is.
intro.alt.en: This page is also available in English.
intro.alt.de: Diese Seite ist auch auf Deutsch verfügbar.
intro.alt.fr: Cette page est aussi disponible en français.
intro.alt.it: Questa pagina è disponibile anche in italiano.
intro.alt.es: Esta página también está disponible en español.
intro.alt.rm: Questa pagina è er disponibla en rumantsch.

intro.switch.context: Site-intro toast: switch-button label, in the OFFERED language, naming that language.

intro.dismiss.context: Site-intro toast: 'Don't show again' button label — persists the opt-out to the settings cookie. Shown in the interface language.

metas.project.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_main' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. project page SEO <title>.

metas.project.desc.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_main' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. project page meta-description.
metas.project.desc.en: About parlhub: what the portal is, answers to common questions, and how the data fits together.
metas.project.desc.de: Über parlhub: was das Portal ist, Antworten auf häufige Fragen und wie die Daten zusammenhängen.
metas.project.desc.fr: À propos de parlhub : ce qu'est le portail, les questions fréquentes et comment les données s'articulent.
metas.project.desc.it: Informazioni su parlhub: cos'è il portale, le domande frequenti e come sono collegati i dati.
metas.project.desc.es: Acerca de parlhub: qué es el portal, respuestas a preguntas frecuentes y cómo se relacionan los datos.

metas.experiments.title.context: SEO copy (NOT UI chrome): read in route meta() via metas/loc.ts from the 'loc_main' namespace 'metas' block; the interface language selects which file. experiments page SEO <title>.

metas.experiments.desc.en: Experimental analyses and methodology showcases on parlhub, including the Wordfish scaling of parliaments from their speeches.
metas.experiments.desc.de: Experimentelle Auswertungen und methodische Showcases auf parlhub, darunter die Wordfish-Skalierung von Parlamenten anhand ihrer Reden.
metas.experiments.desc.fr: Analyses expérimentales et démonstrations méthodologiques sur parlhub, dont le positionnement Wordfish des parlements à partir de leurs discours.
metas.experiments.desc.it: Analisi sperimentali e dimostrazioni metodologiche su parlhub — incluso il posizionamento Wordfish dei parlamenti a partire dai loro discorsi.
metas.experiments.desc.es: Análisis experimentales y demostraciones metodológicas en parlhub — incluido el escalamiento Wordfish de los parlamentos a partir de sus discursos.
